security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src ipc: http://ipc.localhost; img-src 'self' asset: https://asset.localhost data: blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' data:; script-src 'self';

bundle.shortDescription: Tray-first Windows 11 preset manager for Equalizer APO.
bundle.longDescription: SmartEqualizer APO Presets Manager is a Windows 11 desktop app for organizing, editing, applying, importing, exporting, and backing up Equalizer APO presets. It also supports Equalizer APO install and reinstall troubleshooting, convolution WAV attachments, tray-based preset switching, and launch-on-startup control.
